creator: bob@novanet.org
text:
To possibly save anyone else some time, this is exactly what I did to get the driver installed on my FreeBSD 12.1 system.

svn checkout https://svn.freebsd.org/base/releng/`uname -r | cut -d'-' -f1,1` /usr/src

portsnap fetch

portsnap extract

cd /usr/ports/net/realtek-re-kmod/

make install

echo 'if_re_load="YES"' >> /boot/loader.conf
echo 'if_re_name="/boot/modules/if_re.ko"' >> /boot/loader.conf
